/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -Wall -Wno-reorder -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk -dynamiclib -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -compatibility_version 1.0.0 -current_version 1.11.0 -o libenkiTS.1.11.dylib -install_name @rpath/libenkiTS.1.dylib CMakeFiles/enkiTS.dir/TaskScheduler.cc.o CMakeFiles/enkiTS.dir/TaskScheduler_c.cc.o
